name: windy maze
hints: Another windy maze room. Drop something to tell it apart from the others.
E leads to the mirror room (room 2) - that's the way out of the maze!
N=room 32, S=room 31, E=mirror room (room 2, EXIT!), W=room 31.
If you're lost, go E to escape the maze back to the mirror room.
notes: Windy maze room. E=mirror room (room 2, maze exit!). N=32, S=31, W=31. Important: E is the way out.
